name: Odyssey Health, Inc.
business: Odyssey Health, Inc. is a development-stage company focused on acquiring and developing medical products. Its two product candidates are the CardioMap heart monitoring and screening device and the Save-A-Life choking rescue device. Neither product has received regulatory clearance or approval for commercial sale.

exposures.sentence: We have two different technologies in research and development stage; the CardioMap heart monitoring and screening device, and the Save-A-Life choking rescue device.
